title: 5 Humdrum Stocks With Returns of 26% or Greater in 2022
text: These companies can bring stability to your portfolio.

title: 5 Stocks Your Portfolio Must Have Amid Persisting Volatility
text: We have narrowed our search to five large-cap, low-beta and dividend paying stocks that have popped over 25% year to date with more upside left. These are: ADM, GL, LPLA, WRB and SQM.
